figures.title: Overall Model Comparison
figures.caption: Weighted F1 across all nine runs, colored by reliability class.
figures.scientific_purpose: Show the global performance spread while keeping failed baselines visible.

figures.title: Per-Dataset Weighted F1 Comparison
figures.caption: Mode-wise weighted F1 within each dataset.

figures.title: Collapse Warning Chart
figures.caption: Per-class recall for each run, with collapsed runs explicitly marked.
figures.scientific_purpose: Prevent aggregate metrics from hiding one-class failure.

figures.title: Metric Heatmap
figures.caption: Heatmap over accuracy, F1, and per-class recall for all runs.
figures.scientific_purpose: Compact appendix summary of performance and imbalance.

figures.title: Reliability Matrix
figures.caption: Dataset-by-mode matrix labeling each run as valid, weak, or failed.
figures.scientific_purpose: Fast audit view of what is scientifically claimable.

figures.title: Reliable Confusion-Matrix Summary
figures.caption: Confusion matrices for non-collapsed runs only.
figures.scientific_purpose: Appendix evidence that recommended models predict both classes.

figures.title: Prediction Distribution Visualization
figures.caption: Stacked predicted-class counts highlighting one-class collapse.

global_notes.unsupported_labels: unverified/unconfirmed are outside the reported binary claim set and are not silently remapped in this package
global_notes.failed_run_rendering: failed runs may appear in overview plots but remain color-coded and excluded from scientific ranking claims
global_notes.precision_policy: figure sources follow frozen artifact metrics; publication tables round to four decimals while CSV preserves raw precision
